findings.message: New datastore read path `get_item_by_name` issues a `select(Item).where(Item.name == name)` query with no observability: there is no latency/duration metric, no span/trace around the query, and no row-count or error signal. A failure or slow lookup here is invisible to monitoring, and any error is not logged with a correlation id.
findings.suggestion: Wrap the query in a span/timer and emit a duration (and outcome) metric, e.g. record latency via a histogram and a span around the `session.scalars(...).first()` call, and log any exception with the request/correlation id before re-raising.
